title: Arivela cleomoides

Arivela cleomoides is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Cameroon and Democratic Republic of the Congo. This plant is typically found in areas with moist and humid climates. Arivela cleomoides is classified as a small shrub or herbaceous plant with a distinctive appearance.
